name: @gonext/blocks-patterns
description: First-party block patterns for GoNext — pre-built BlockTree fixtures (hero, features, pricing, testimonials, CTA, gallery, contact, header, footer, post grid) authors can insert as a starter. Ships a PatternRegistry plus ten curated patterns built on @gonext/blocks-core. Used by the editor's Patterns inserter tab. Apache-2.0.

scripts.build: echo '@gonext/blocks-patterns: source-only package, no build step'
